title: Create migration 042: Add currentEmpCode columns to attendance_scan_logs
description: Add columns for currentEmpCode resolution to attendance_scan_logs table: resolved_nik, current_emp_code, current_employee_id, current_mapping_status, current_mapping_reason, current_resolved_at

files.change: Add currentEmpCode tracking columns to attendance_scan_logs

implementation: Create migration file with IF NOT EXISTS checks for each column
Add resolved_nik NVARCHAR(30) NULL for NIK from HR_EMPLOYEE lookup
Add current_emp_code NVARCHAR(30) NULL for resolved current employee code
Add current_employee_id INT NULL for FK to employees table
Add current_mapping_reason NVARCHAR(500) NULL for resolution explanation
Add current_resolved_at DATETIME2 NULL for resolution timestamp
Create index IX_scan_logs_resolved_nik ON attendance_scan_logs(resolved_nik) WHERE resolved_nik IS NOT NULL
Create index IX_scan_logs_current_emp_code ON attendance_scan_logs(current_emp_code) WHERE current_emp_code IS NOT NULL

reference.examples: Use IF NOT EXISTS pattern, backup tables before schema changes, print row counts

criteria: 6 new columns added to attendance_scan_logs table

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='attendance_scan_logs' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('resolved_nik','current_emp_code','current_employee_id','current_mapping_status','current_mapping_reason','current_resolved_at') returns 6

rationale.chosen_approach: Direct column addition with indexes for query performance
alternatives_considered: Separate tracking table - rejected due to join complexity
Computed columns - rejected due to performance overhead
rationale.tradeoffs: Additional storage per row but enables complete tracking

manual_checks: Verify all 6 columns exist after migration
success_metrics: Zero rows affected for existing data modification

risks.description: Large table scan_logs may cause migration timeout
risks.mitigation: Run during off-peak hours; set migration timeout to 5 minutes
risks.fallback: Split into batched approach with row-by-row updates
